blockers: GKG CLI is missing from PATH and the GKG server is not reachable/indexed; GitNexus CLI and direct source inspection were used.
GitNexus detect_changes is unavailable in the installed CLI surface; gitnexus status and git diff checks were used.
Global git diff --check passes cleanly after artifact normalization.
W-01, W-02, and W-03 are closed with verification evidence; release-owner sign-off is still needed for remaining P1/P2 product and safety backlog before an unconstrained Production Ready claim.
summary: Completed and committed W-02 pharmacy dispensing and W-03 notification delivery evidence after the prior W-01 lab-result slice. Staff inventory now supports prescription-backed dispense against item/lot/medical-record data, inventory delete has browser confirmation, email delivery attempts are persisted, and ReminderService keeps failed external delivery retryable. Backend, frontend, Docker, Playwright, audit, secret-scan, and backup/restore release gates passed on 2026-06-01. Current verdict is Release Candidate / Ship with fixes because the wider P1/P2 UX and safety backlog remains.
next_action: Continue the P1 backlog: remaining fake/static UI actions, destructive confirmations outside inventory/lab delete, patient self-service scope decisions, and clinical safety policy.
